warm_up: Review top error from last session: vocabulary.
focus: Practice temporal duration phrases using 'seit' + dative (e.g., seit einem Tag, seit zwei Wochen) to accurately describe how long symptoms have been present.
speaking_prompt: Call the restaurant to book a table for two for tomorrow evening at 7pm. Klaus answers. Confirm the reservation and ask if they need anything from you.
carry_forward_errors: Seit einem Tag / Einen Tag lang (was: Ein Tag) — session 2026-04-25
